ddls:
CREATE TABLE "covid19_data" (
  "_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the report */,
  "source" TEXT /* Data source (e.g., hospital, clinic, etc.) */,
  "upload_date_time" TEXT /* Date and time when the data was uploaded */,
  "confirmed_cases_physicians" INTEGER /* Number of confirmed cases among physicians */,
  "confirmed_cases_nurses" INTEGER /* Number of confirmed cases among nurses */,
  "confirmed_cases_other_healthcare_workers" INTEGER /* Number of confirmed cases among other healthcare workers */,
  "total_confirmed_cases" INTEGER /* Total number of confirmed cases */,
  "isolated_physicians" INTEGER /* Number of isolated physicians */,
  "isolated_nurses" INTEGER /* Number of isolated nurses */,
  "isolated_other_healthcare_workers" INTEGER /* Number of isolated other healthcare workers */,
  "total_isolated_workers" INTEGER /* Total number of isolated workers */,
  "infection_rate" REAL /* Infection rate among healthcare workers */,
  "recovery_rate" REAL /* Recovery rate among healthcare workers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_covid19_data_source FOREIGN KEY ("source") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "healthcare_workers" (
  "worker_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each healthcare worker */,
  "worker_name" TEXT /* Full name of the healthcare worker */,
  "worker_type" TEXT /* Type of healthcare worker (e.g., physician, nurse, other) */,
  "facility" TEXT /* Facility where the healthcare worker is employed */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the healthcare worker */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the healthcare worker */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the healthcare worker */,
  "vaccination_status" TEXT /* COVID-19 vaccination status of the healthcare worker */,
  "vaccination_date" TEXT /* Date of COVID-19 vaccination */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("worker_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_healthcare_workers_facility FOREIGN KEY ("facility") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "facilities" (
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each facility */,
  "facility_name" TEXT /* Name of the facility */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the facility */,
  "capacity_beds" INTEGER /* Number of beds available at the facility */,
  "capacity_staff" INTEGER /* Number of staff members at the facility */,
  "ppe_availability" TEXT /* Availability of personal protective equipment (PPE) at the facility */,
  "sanitation_protocols" TEXT /* Sanitation protocols in place at the facility */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., hospital, clinic, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "uploads" (
  "upload_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each upload */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the data source */,
  "upload_date_time" TEXT /* Date and time when the data was uploaded */,
  "uploaded_by" TEXT /* User who uploaded the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("upload_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_uploads_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)
